zh.lifeSummary: 當Maria Catharina Mattheis於1699年1月2日出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲茨魏布呂肯時，她的父親Johannes B Mattheis25歲，母親Anna Margaretha Lossen11歲。她於1720年3月7日與Johannes Peter Mohr在德國貝也普法爾茲結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1761年5月3日在美國賓夕法尼亞州約克約克享年62歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州約克韋斯特 曼徹斯特 堂史普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maria Catharina Mattheis于1699年1月2日出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲茨魏布呂肯时，她的父亲Johannes B Mattheis25岁，母亲Anna Margaretha Lossen11岁。她于1720年3月7日与Johannes Peter Mohr在德国貝也普法爾茲结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1761年5月3日在美国宾夕法尼亚州約克約克享年62岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州約克韋斯特 曼徹斯特 堂史普。

nameMeanings.name: Mattheis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Bernd, Erwin, Ewald, Friedrich.
German: from a variant of the personal name Matthäus (see Matthew ).

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name Ma(t)thew, a vernacular form of the Greek New Testament name Matthias, Matthaios, which is ultimately from the Hebrew personal name Matityahu ‘gift of God’. This was taken into Latin as Mat(t)hias and Matthaeus respectively, the former being used for the twelfth apostle (who replaced Judas Iscariot) and the latter for the author of the first Gospel. In many European languages this distinction is reflected in different name forms. The commonest vernacular forms of the personal name, including English Matthew, Old French Matheu, Spanish Mateo, Italian Matteo, Portuguese Mateus, Catalan and Occitan Mateu are generally derived from the form Matthaeus. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, including German Matthias , Greek Mathias and Mattheos, Assyrian/Chaldean Matti , Czech Matěj, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Matej . The name Matthew is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Mathai ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Mathew , see also Matthews .

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Catharina
meanings: English: An English form of Catharine.

en.lifeSummary: When Maria Catharina Mattheis was born on 2 January 1699, in Zweibrücken, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, her father, Johannes B Mattheis, was 25 and her mother, Anna Margaretha Lossen, was 11. She married Johannes Peter Mohr on 7 March 1720, in Palatinate, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 3 May 1761, in York, York, Pennsylvania, United States, at the age of 62, and was buried in West Manchester Township, York, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maria Catharina Mattheis est née le 2 janvier 1699, à Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Johannes B Mattheis, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Anna Margaretha Lossen, avait 11 ans. Elle a épousé Johannes Peter Mohr le 7 mars 1720, à Pfalz, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 mai 1761, à York, York, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à West Manchester Township, York, Pennsylvanie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maria Catharina Mattheis am 2. Januar 1699 in Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Johannes B Mattheis 25 und ihre Mutter Anna Margaretha Lossen 11. Sie hat am 7. März 1720 in Pfalz, Bayern, Deutschland Johannes Peter Mohr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Mai 1761 im Alter von 62 Jahren in York, York, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in West Manchester Township, York, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Catharina Mattheis è nata il il 2 gennaio 1699 nel Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, sua padre, Johannes B Mattheis, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Anna Margaretha Lossen, aveva 11 anni. Lei sposato Johannes Peter Mohr il 7 marzo 1720, nel Pfalz, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 3 maggio 1761, nel York, York, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a West Manchester Township, York, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Maria Catharina Mattheisが1699年1月2日にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズズウエイブルuクンで生まれた時，父Johannes B Mattheisは25歳，母Anna Margaretha Lossenは11歳であった。1720年3月7日にドイツバイエルンプファルズでJohannes Peter Mohrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1761年5月3日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州ヨークヨークで62歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカペンシルベニア州ヨークウエスト マンチェスター トウンシュイップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maria Catharina Mattheis(이)가 1699년 1월 2일 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 즈위브uc켄에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Johannes B Mattheis(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Margaretha Lossen(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 1720년 3월 7일 독일 베이른 p팔즈에서 Johannes Peter Mohr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1761년 5월 3일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 요르크 요르크에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 요르크 웨스트 먼체스터 타운시프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Catharina Mattheis nasceu em 2 de janeiro de 1699, em Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Johannes B Mattheis, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Anna Margaretha Lossen, tinha 11 anos. Ela casou-se com Johannes Peter Mohr em 7 de março de 1720, em Pfalz, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de maio de 1761, em York, York, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em West Manchester Township, York, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maria Catharina Mattheis родилась 2 января 1699 г. в местности звибрuккен, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, её отцу по имени Johannes B Mattheis было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Margaretha Lossen, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Johannes Peter Mohr 7 марта 1720 г. в местности пфалз, беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 3 мая 1761 г. в местности ерк, ерк, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности вест манчестир тоуншип, ерк, Пенсильвания, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maria Catharina Mattheis nació el 2 de enero de 1699, en Zweibrücken, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, su papá, Johannes B Mattheis, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Anna Margaretha Lossen, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Johannes Peter Mohr el 7 de marzo de 1720, en Pfalz, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 3 de mayo de 1761, en York, York, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en West Manchester Township, York, Pensilvania, British Colonial America.
